title: My Cousin's Visit
story_html: My cousin comes to visit on Saturday. She is cheerful and kind. We go to the zoo together. We see a monkey. It climbs a tall tree. Its fur is brown and soft. Next we see a big lizard. It has green scales. We watch it rest in the sun. After the zoo, we eat lunch. I have soup with a strange flavor. My cousin eats bread with butter. At home, we work on a school project. It is about animals. We care about doing a good job. Every day I follow the same routine. I wake up. I eat breakfast. Then I go to school.

care.def: To feel that someone or something is important to you.

kind.def: Friendly, caring, and helpful to others.

scales.def: The small hard pieces that cover a reptile's body.

fur.def: The soft hair that covers some animals.

project.def: A piece of school work that takes several days.

routine.def: The usual things you do every day, in order.

cheerful.def: Happy and full of good spirits.

monkey.def: An animal that climbs trees and uses its hands well.

bread.def: A food made by baking a mixture of flour and water.

questions.qtext: Who comes to visit on Saturday?
questions.explain: The story says, "My cousin comes to visit on Saturday."

questions.qtext: What animal do they see first at the zoo?
questions.explain: The story says, "We see a monkey," before they see the lizard.

questions.qtext: "Its fur is brown and soft." What does fur mean?
options: The soft hair on an animal
The loud sound an animal makes
questions.explain: Fur is the soft hair that covers some animals, like the monkey's fur.

options: Small hard pieces on a reptile's body
questions.explain: Scales are the small hard pieces that cover a reptile's body, like the lizard's scales.

questions.qtext: What do they do at home after the zoo?
questions.explain: The story says, "At home, we work on a school project."
